description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages extras, platforms, primary and secondary. Add a pages job that runs on the debian:unstable image (only on the master branch), executes ./configure, make docs, moves the generated documentation into a public/ directory and publishes that directory as an artifact. Define a series of pre_re jobs (pre_re:centos-current, pre_re:centos-previous, pre_re:clang-3.9, pre_re:clang-4.0, pre_re:clang-5.0, pre_re:clang-6.0, pre_re:clang-7, pre_re:clang-8, pre_re:debian-oldstable, pre_re:debian-stable, pre_re:debian-testing, pre_re:gcc-4.8, pre_re:gcc-4.9, pre_re:gcc-6, pre_re:gcc-7, pre_re:gcc-8) each using its specified Docker image (centos:8, centos:7, debian:stretch, debian:buster, debian:unstable, debian:oldstable, debian:stable, debian:testing, debian:jessie), a before_script that echoes the build name, runs uname, updates the package manager, installs $INSTALL_PACKAGES and $DEBIAN_COMMON_PACKAGES, imports the ragnarok database and fetches plugins, and then runs ./tools/ci/travis.sh build with the appropriate compiler (CC=clang‑X or CC=gcc‑X or default) followed by ./tools/ci/travis.sh test against a mariadb or mysql service version matching the job. All pre_re jobs inherit the .branch_exceptions rules: they run only on branch pipelines and are excluded from the rathena and coverity_scan branches, and they set variables for DEBIAN_COMMON_PACKAGES, INSTALL_PACKAGES, GIT_DEPTH, MYSQL_* credentials and SQLHOST as defined per job. No caches are defined beyond the default, and only the pages job produces artifacts.
